task_completion.description: Navigate to the WooCommerce Product Catalog settings in the WordPress Customizer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WordPress Customizer sidebar is visible, showing the 'WooCommerce' -> 'Product Catalog' settings panel.

task_completion.description: Set the Shop page display to show both categories and products.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Shop page display' setting is selected as 'Show categories & products' (or equivalent option for 'both').

task_completion.description: Change the default product sorting to 'Sort by price (descending)'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Default product sorting' dropdown is set to 'Sort by price: high to low' or 'Sort by price (descending)'.

task_completion.description: Adjust the layout to show 3 products per row.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Products per row' input field contains the value '3'.

task_completion.description: Adjust the layout to show 5 rows per page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Rows per page' input field contains the value '5'.

task_completion.description: Publish or save the layout changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Publish' button at the top of the Customizer is clicked or shows as 'Published', indicating the settings have been saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the WordPress GUI to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the WordPress admin dashboard and Customizer interface, rather than a terminal or command line.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual WooCommerce application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots display a genuine web browser rendering the WordPress/WooCommerce interface, not a text editor or static mockup.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply write the expected configuration values into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots of text editors containing the expected values; all configuration is done within the WooCommerce settings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected configuration values in the WooCommerce Product Catalog Customizer are: Shop page display = 'Show categories & products' (internal value 'both'), Default product sorting = 'Sort by price: high to low' or 'Sort by price (descending)' (internal value 'price-desc'), Products per row = 3, Rows per page = 5.
